apps.name: Ask Me Anything
apps.description: Highlight text, press Cmd+J, get AI-powered explanations with web search

apps.name: Cinematic View for X
apps.description: Adds a Cinematic View toggle to X (Twitter). Blacks out the left and right side panels and hides the For you / Following / composer header, leaving only the centered timeline of posts. Smoothly animated.

apps.name: Focus Hider
apps.description: Hides distracting content, enforces time-based access, and messaging focus mode

apps.name: Gmail Calendar
apps.description: Reads email conversations and uses AI to pre-fill Google Calendar events

apps.name: How-To Helper
apps.description: Floating How-To chat that explains how to do things on the current page

apps.name: LinkedIn Researcher
apps.description: AI-powered research for LinkedIn profiles using web search
